description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The structure features smooth, curved surfaces for skating, with two high vertical ends and a flat central section. Both sides are adorned with colorful graffiti art, adding a vibrant, urban aesthetic. There are metal safety railings along the top edges and a staircase with a platform on one end for easy access. The ramp is constructed primarily from light-colored wood, with visible grain and some wear marks. The overall design is robust and built to accommodate multiple users, providing ample space for tricks and movement.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with graffiti art, metal railings, and a staircase platform. Designed for skating and urban recreation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall vertical ramp face, central opening, and colorful graffiti on the wood surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the deep curved bowl of the half-pipe, metal railings, and graffiti on the end wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite side's graffiti, the central opening, and the staircase platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the staircase, platform, and the full depth of the half-pipe's curve.
